zh.lifeSummary: 當Willem Van Arkel於1440年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普時，他的父親Otto van Arkel30歲，母親Elizabeth Molenaar26歲。他和Marigjen Evertsen de Bar至少有8個兒子。他於1485年在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普被列為waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop)。他去世於1493年在荷蘭-拉藍德莫倫藍登阿可爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Willem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The courtyard Episcopal palace at Atrecht had witch burnings.
Beginning of the rule of the Austrian Habsburgs.

en.lifeSummary: When Willem Van Arkel was born in 1440, in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Otto van Arkel, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Molenaar, was 26. He had at least 8 sons with Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. In 1485, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands. He died in 1493, in Arkel, Molenlanden, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Willem Van Arkel est né en 1440, à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto van Arkel, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Molenaar, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils avec Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. En 1485, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé en 1493, à Arkel, Molenlanden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Willem Van Arkel 1440 in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto van Arkel 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Molenaar 26. Er hatte mit Marigjen Evertsen de Bar mindestens 8 Söhne. 1485, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb 1493 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Arkel, Molenlanden, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Willem Van Arkel è nato il nel 1440 nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Otto van Arkel, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Molenaar, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli con Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. Nel 1485, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì nel 1493, nel Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Willem Van Arkelが1440年にオランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップで生まれた時，父Otto van Arkelは30歳，母Elizabeth Molenaarは26歳であった。彼はMarigjen Evertsen de Barとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。1485年，45歳の時，オランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップでの職業はwaarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop)と記録されている。彼は1493年にオランダズイド-hオランドモレンランデンアルケルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Willem Van Arkel(이)가 1440년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto van Arkel(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Molenaar(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Marigjen Evertsen de Bar(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 1485년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop)이었다. 그는 1493년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 모렌랜든 아클에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Willem Van Arkel nasceu em 1440, em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto van Arkel, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Molenaar, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. Em 1485, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 1493, em Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 53 anos.

ro.Arkel, , South Holland, Netherlands: Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Willem Van Arkel родился в 1440 г. в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Otto van Arkel было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Molenaar, 26. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. В 1485 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер в 1493 г. в местности аркел, моленланден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Willem Van Arkel nació en 1440, en Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Otto van Arkel, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Molenaar, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Marigjen Evertsen de Bar. En 1485, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era waarsman van 't leegeynd van middelkoop (goodsman of the low end (?) of middelkoop) en Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Murió en 1493, en Arkel, Molenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 53 años.
